verse_specific_anchors: the symmetric joint negation (vetti hantāram / manyate hatam — both fail to know) preserved as 'whoever thinks they are killing / whoever thinks they are killed'

verdict_reason: I tested against neighbors. BG 2.16 cuts but does not negate symmetric attribution. BG 2.17 names substrate but does not negate agency. BG 2.18 LICENSES action — opposite move.
